settings.title: Walnut shell + rosehip
settings.text: Finely milled walnut shell powder physically lifts dead skin, oil, and the keratin that causes buttne and KP bumps. Rosehip oil fades the dark spots.

settings.title: Vegan + cruelty-free
settings.text: 98% natural ingredients. No synthetic fragrance, no parabens, no sulfates, no animal testing. Ever.

settings.title: 1% to Every Mother Counts
settings.text: We donate 1% of every sale to provide maternal-health care to women around the world. Your routine helps more than just your skin.

settings.quote: The first time I used this scrub, my skin was so smooth. Now I've only been using it a few weeks and I've already seen a reduction in buttne and stretch marks.

settings.press_quote: Amazon's best-selling butt scrub. Now on Shopify.
settings.story_title: Because it's not getting enough recognition.
settings.story_text: Walking down countless skincare aisles, we saw endless miracle face masks, arm scrubs, and face washes — but everyone forgot about the bum. Big brands were too busy overcharging for synthetic ingredients made in big factories, marketed by women who looked like they hadn't eaten a carb in 3 years. So we made our own. *Disclaimer: we eat carbs.*
